message:
fix(obligation/ledger): include leaked obligations in check_leaks detection

check_leaks() and check_leaks_for_region() previously only flagged
obligations in the Reserved state. Obligations that had been explicitly
marked as leaked via is_leaked() were silently ignored, meaning the leak
detection would miss obligations that the system already knew were leaked
but had not yet cleaned up.

The filter now uses (o.is_pending() || o.is_leaked()) to capture both:
- Obligations still pending resolution (is_pending covers Reserved)
- Obligations already marked as leaked by other detection mechanisms

This ensures check_leaks provides a complete picture of all unresolved
obligations, not just those that haven't been triaged yet.

Test: check_leaks_includes_marked_leaked_obligations creates an obligation,
marks it as leaked, and verifies check_leaks() correctly reports it.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
